items.title: Sources: Alonso agrees to become Chelsea coach
items.summary: Xabi Alonso is set to be confirmed as Chelsea head coach within the next 24 hours, sources have told ESPN, after agreeing to terms to take charge at Stamford Bridge.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 2026 Preakness Stakes predictions, odds, field, location, track, time: Picks via proven horse racing expert
items.summary: Gene Menez revealed his Preakness Stakes 2026 picks for the second leg of the Triple Crown on Saturday, May 16 at Laurel Park in Maryland
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Glamorgan seamers prosper on damp day in Birmingham
items.summary: Warwickshire off the pace despite Oliver Hannon-Dalby's second successive five-wicket haul
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
